name: @fractaal/pi-claude-bridge
description: Pi provider bridge that runs Claude Code through the Claude Agent SDK.

settings.label: Enable Claude bridge provider
settings.description: Register claude-bridge models that route Pi turns through Claude Code via the Claude Agent SDK.

settings.label: System prompt
settings.description: Use Claude Code's preset prompt or pass Pi's complete system prompt through unchanged.

settings.label: Forward AGENTS.md + skills
settings.description: In Claude Code prompt mode, append AGENTS.md and Pi's skills block to Claude Code's preset prompt.

settings.label: Forward APPEND_SYSTEM.md
settings.description: Opt in to forwarding project/global APPEND_SYSTEM.md content to Claude Code. Off by default because these files can be Pi-specific.

settings.label: Forward project agents hook
settings.description: Forward recognized pi-agents-tmux before_agent_start prompt additions such as the Project Agents/Subagents list. Off by default.

settings.label: Forward task panel hook
settings.description: Forward recognized pi-task-panel workflow reminders from before_agent_start. Off by default.

settings.label: Forward caveman hook
settings.description: Forward recognized pi-caveman response-style prompt additions from before_agent_start. Off by default.

settings.label: Strict MCP config
settings.description: When Claude Code filesystem settings are loaded, tell Claude Code to use only MCP servers passed by the bridge, avoiding token-heavy MCP auto-loads.

settings.label: Allow extra usage helper
settings.description: Allow claude-bridge to launch Claude Code's /extra-usage flow when rate limits require extra usage. Billing/admin approval still happens in Claude's browser page.

settings.label: Fast mode
settings.description: Enable Claude Code fast mode for bridge requests when the selected model supports it. Off by default.

settings.label: Force Claude effort
settings.description: Override Pi's thinking-level mapping for every bridge request. Pi 0.80.6 and newer can select max natively; none keeps Pi's selected level.

settings.label: Model effort overrides
settings.description: Optional JSON object mapping claude-bridge model ids to Claude Code effort levels.

settings.label: Claude executable path
settings.description: Optional explicit path to the claude binary. If empty, the bridge auto-detects claude or claude-code on PATH.

author: vanillagreen, maintained by fractaal
